title: Resources to help you with your application - Canada.ca
content:
## Resources to help you with your application
These resources can help you with your proposal when you’re applying to an open funding process.

## Web tools and applicant resources
The following resources may assist you as you write your application.
- Frequently asked questions – commonly-asked applicant questions with answers regarding the Call for Proposals (CFP) 2024 process
- Policy on Transfer Payments - How we give you money if your proposal is accepted and how official agreements work.
- IRCC's Commitments to Anti-racism
- IRCC Settlement and Resettlement Program Logic Model - logic model that maps out the two programs’ direct services and outcomes.
- Outcomes and Measurement – settlement program outcomes guidance document
- Terms and Conditions - the requirements and standards that underpin all our Settlement contribution agreements.
- Budget Submission Guidance - required budget information and list of eligible and ineligible items for the Settlement Program.
- Case Management Framework – guidance document
- How to apply to become a Local Immigration Partnership (LIP) – guidance document
- Canadian Language Benchmarks
- National Standardized Assessment Template for Needs and Assets Assessment and Referrals Service – template for NAARS
- CNC Program Requirements

### Resettlement Assistance Program-specific
- Terms and Conditions - the requirements and standards that underpin all our Resettlement Assistance Program contribution agreements.
- Resettlement Assistance Program (RAP) Service Provider Handbook - Canada.ca
- Existing Government Assisted Refugee Receiving Centres – a list of communities outside of Quebec where Government-Assisted Refugees are destined in which Resettlement Assistance Program services are delivered upon arrival.
- Budget Submission Guidance - required budget information and list of eligible and ineligible items for the Resettlement Assistance Program.

### Francophone Integration Pathway
- Francophone Immigration Strategy – information/ web site
- Action Plan for Official Languages – 2023-2028: Protection-Promotion-Collaboration – information/ website
- New RIF Logic Model – logic model for Réseaux en immigration francophone
- Rapport public CCNÉF (in French only)

### Government of Canada

### Gender-based Analysis Plus (GBA Plus)
- Gender-based Analysis Plus (GBA Plus)
- Take the Gender-based Analysis Plus course
- Integrating Gender-based Analysis Plus into Evaluation: A Primer

### Volunteer Management Handbook
- Handbook from Volunteer Canada (PDF, 6.2MB) provides a general overview of the volunteer management process with a focus on volunteers supporting newcomers. Please note that the links in the handbook are not currently available
CFP 2024 Glossary of terms
The Guide on Equity, Diversity and Inclusion Terminology: an essential tool!
